message:
chore(lockfile): refresh Cargo.lock for criterion dev-dep (br-frankenpandas-xha7)

Landing the lock-file half of 5cd01a4 (bench(fp-conformance):
criterion vs_pandas scaffolding). That commit added criterion 0.5
to fp-conformance dev-dependencies and landed the bench source,
but the matching Cargo.lock update was left behind in the working
tree of the authoring agent and never committed.

Criterion pulls in a few standard transitive deps at dev-dep scope
only (anes, anstyle, cast, ciborium family, clap_builder/clap_lex,
criterion-plot, is-terminal, itertools, oorandom, same-file,
tinytemplate, tracing/tracing-core, walkdir, winapi-util). Nothing
in this set reaches production code — only `cargo bench` and
`cargo test --benches`.

Picked up from working-tree drift; no Cargo.toml changes in this
commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
